name: @maddr/mutator-service
description: The Mutator API service (docs/07): the server-side authority over genomes. Stateless HTTP over a pluggable store; immutable genome rows with parentIds lineage, mandatory idempotency, server-seeded auditable RNG, and signed rosters for match servers. Imports @maddr/genome-core for all mutation math; no graphics, no game engine.
